title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero describes how Cursor has built agent systems across the full software development lifecycle, including bug triage, security review, growth experiments, and project management. The talk frames the real bottleneck as the broader SDLC rather than code generation alone, and discusses strategies for breaking past the 40% productivity plateau that most companies hit with AI coding assistants.
